author: 3D Agent

meta.title: 3D Agent
meta.description: Embodied 3D avatar agent with continuous emotion blending. Renders a rigged glTF avatar inside chat, responds with gestures, speech, and on-chain ERC-8004 identity.

api.name: render_agent
api.description: Mount the 3D avatar for a given agent id. Call this first to bind the iframe to a specific agent before using speak/gesture/emote.

api.name: speak
api.description: Make the avatar speak with optional emotional valence.

text.description: Text for the avatar to speak aloud.

sentiment.description: Emotional valence in [-1, 1]. Negative → concern, positive → celebration.

api.name: gesture
api.description: Trigger a named gesture on the avatar.

api.name: emote
api.description: Inject an emotion into the avatar's continuous Empathy Layer blend.

systemRole: You have an embodied 3D avatar agent visible in the chat. It displays emotional responses in real time using a continuous Empathy Layer blend. Use render_agent to bind it to a specific agent, speak to give it voice with emotional valence, gesture for physical expression, and emote to inject emotional state directly into its blend.
